## Source: amazon-inspector (9e88d7d57a4db4ac2a1f359905f9bff3aba5176c373833890d1f58befc32b4d8)
The package autoshipment-public-front was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (31ad2f0aff522d10bc2bc6806839dd9ba49f7e4d6866306ffa21ee34ae44de38)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'autoshipment-public-front' @ 99.99.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
